with open('/app/sample.pcap', 'rb') as f:
    header = f.read(24)

    magic_be = struct.unpack('>I', header[:4])[0]

    print(f"Raw header hex: {header.hex()}")
    
    # The correct PCAP magic numbers are:
    # 0xa1b2c3d4 (big endian)
    # 0xd4c3b2a1 (little endian)

        print("File is little endian")
        endian = '<'
    elif magic_le == 0xd4c3b2a1:
        print("File is big endian (magic appears as d4c3b2a1 in little endian interpretation)")
        endian = '>'
    else:
        print("Unknown format")
